test_cases.failure_message:
Timed out after 1200.001s.
Timed out waiting for 3 control plane machines to exist
Expected
    <int>: 2
to equal
    <int>: 3
test_cases.failure_body:
[FAILED] Timed out after 1200.001s.
Timed out waiting for 3 control plane machines to exist
Expected
    <int>: 2
to equal
    <int>: 3
In [It] at: /home/prow/go/pkg/mod/sigs.k8s.io/cluster-api/test@v1.13.2/framework/controlplane_helpers.go:115 @ 06/03/26 15:36:07.1

ai_summary.summary: Test failed due to incomplete control plane machine provisioning, but root cause remains undetermined from available evidence.

ai_analysis.root_cause: The Azure activity log (artifacts/clusters/k8s-upgrade-and-conformance-1lsjdq/azure-activity-logs/capz-e2e-bq77bj.log) shows successful creation of VM k8s-upgrade-and-conformance-1lsjdq-control-plane-k7b52 and its NIC, contradicting the build-log.txt timeout waiting for 3 control plane machines. No AzureMachine YAML was consulted to confirm status.failureMessage, and controller logs (capz-controller-manager) were not found to contain provisioning errors. The evidence chain is incomplete.
ai_analysis.suggested_fix: No remediation possible from available evidence: artifacts show successful Azure VM creation but no AzureMachine YAML status.failureMessage was consulted, and controller logs were not analyzed. Need to check AzureMachine/<name>.yaml for failure messages and grep capz-controller-manager logs for provisioning errors.
